text: computeDashboardWarnings in dashboardProject.ts implements name mismatch detection between DNI fullName and electricity bill titular. It uses word-level intersection: splits both names into words >2 chars, normalizes accents (NFD decomposition), and flags mismatch if NO common word exists. Warning key is 'titular-mismatch'. Warnings are rendered in StatusCell as red AlertTriangle badges per warning. This covers H12 in the test plan.
issue: Feature: name mismatch warning between DNI and electricity bill titular
